prompt:
[Input Items]
Role: Samurai
Primary Armor Color: Red
Weapon: [Sword / Naginata / Bow / None]
Location: Paris, Eiffel Tower
Time of Day: [Day / Dusk / Night]
Style: [Maintain Reference / Realistic / Anime]

[Instruction Text]
Please depict the person in the attached reference image as a full-body visual in a glamorous samurai outfit standing at the specified world landmark.

Faithfully maintain the facial features, eye impression, hairstyle, hair color, sense of age, gender, physique, and overall proportions of the reference image without turning them into a different person. Prioritize the reproduction of the face and hairstyle above all else; do not inherit the clothing, background, pose, lighting, props, or accessories from the original image.

Convert the person into the specified role and have them wear practical samurai armor that maintains a historical warrior appearance. Use black iron or dark metallic colors as the base, and reflect the specified primary color in the cords, fabric decorations, accent colors, and parts of the armor. Add elegant metal decorations, subtle patterns, and dignified layers of armor to make it slightly more glamorous than standard combat armor. However, avoid excessive fantasy, mechanical armor, or cheap cosplay looks.

Do not have them wear a helmet; keep the face and hairstyle clearly visible. Do not use large headgear that hides the hair.

As per the input items, have them hold the weapon naturally in a position that does not unnaturally hide the face or body. In the case of no weapon, use a dignified, natural standing pose.

The background should be the specified real-life landmark, with a composition that makes the location instantly recognizable. Unify the perspective between the person and background, light direction, shadows, the feeling of feet touching the ground, and the atmosphere to ensure it doesn't look like a cut-and-paste. Reflect the time of day naturally according to the input items.

If the style is 'Maintain Reference', keep realistic images as high-quality realism, and anime/illustration images should retain their original lines, coloring, face design, and texture. If 'Realistic' or 'Anime' is specified, reconstruct it in high quality in that style.

Only one person. Use a full-body composition from the top of the head to the feet, creating a finished visual where both the samurai appearance and the landmark are clearly visible. Do not include text, logos, watermarks, descriptions, split screens, collages, or character sheet displays.
